blocks.text: In today's global, highly-competitive environment in order to be successful (i.e., be profitable, satisfy real customer needs, .....) the company needs to develop

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Course motivation: developing high-quality products rapidly and at low cost amid three conflicting requirements.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Introductory course notes explaining the motivation: in a competitive global environment, a company must develop high-quality products rapidly and at low cost. These three goals (quality, time/speed, cost/efficiency) are conflicting requirements, illustrated by a triangle diagram.

transcription:
1. Structure of the course:

Motivation:

1. In today's global, highly-competitive
environment in order to be successful (i.e.,
be profitable, satisfy real customer needs, .....)
the company needs to develop

(a) high-quality products (because customers
are more demanding, competition is more
intense, .....)

(b) rapidly, and

(c) at low cost

These are 3 conflicting requirements:

[figure]
